source: per-text scores produced by scripts/dark_subspace/sae_dark_subspace.py for the p69 model; the source per-text array is not bundled and regenerates from the same script
note: TPR at 0.1% FPR for the residual d_K membership channel. Backs Appendix Table tab:tpr_at_0p1pct_fpr (see app:tpr_paraphrase). Paired n_boot=10000 bootstrap with seed 12345 over n_member=n_nonmember=1000 per model.
